  \*************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************/
/**
 * The following styles get applied both on the front of your site
 * and in the editor.
 *
 * Replace them with your own styles or remove the file completely.
 */
/* icons & options */
.goldeyes-post-likes__button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  position: relative;
  border: none !important;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  background: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 0 0 2px !important;
  top: 1.6px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.goldeyes-post-likes__button svg {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transform: scale(1);
  transition: opacity 0.25s, transform 0.25s, visibility 0.25s;
}

.liked .goldeyes-post-likes_unlike-icon,
.unliked .goldeyes-post-likes_like-icon {
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
  transform: scale(2);
}

/*# sourceMappingURL=style-index.css.map*/
</style>
<style id='wp-block-post-template-inline-css'>
.wp-block-post-template{box-sizing:border-box;list-style:none;margin-bottom:0;margin-top:0;max-width:100%;padding:0}.wp-block-post-template.is-flex-container{display:flex;flex-direction:row;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.25em}.wp-block-post-template.is-flex-container>li{margin:0;width:100%}@media (min-width:600px){.wp-block-post-template.is-flex-container.is-flex-container.columns-2>li{width:calc(50% - .625em)}.wp-block-post-template.is-flex-container.is-flex-container.columns-3>li{width:calc(33.33333% - .83333em)}.wp-block-post-template.is-flex-container.is-flex-container.columns-4>li{width:calc(25% - .9375em)}.wp-block-post-template.is-flex-container.is-flex-container.columns-5>li{width:calc(20% - 1em)}.wp-block-post-template.is-flex-container.is-flex-container.columns-6>li{width:calc(16.66667% - 1.04167em)}}@media (max-width:600px){.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-grid.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-grid.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-grid.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-constrained>li>.alignright,.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-flow>li>.alignright{float:right;margin-inline-end:0;margin-inline-start:2em}.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-constrained>li>.alignleft,.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-flow>li>.alignleft{float:left;margin-inline-end:2em;margin-inline-start:0}.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-constrained>li>.aligncenter,.wp-block-post-template-is-layout-flow>li>.aligncenter{margin-inline-end:auto;margin-inline-start:auto}
</style>
<style id='wp-block-query-pagination-inline-css'>
.wp-block-query-pagination.is-content-justification-space-between>.wp-block-query-pagination-next:last-of-type{margin-inline-start:auto}.wp-block-query-pagination.is-content-justification-space-between>.wp-block-query-pagination-previous:first-child{margin-inline-end:auto}.wp-block-query-pagination .wp-block-query-pagination-previous-arrow{display:inline-block;margin-right:1ch}.wp-block-query-pagination .wp-block-query-pagination-previous-arrow:not(.is-arrow-chevron){transform:scaleX(1)}.wp-block-query-pagination .wp-block-query-pagination-next-arrow{display:inline-block;margin-left:1ch}.wp-block-query-pagination .wp-block-query-pagination-next-arrow:not(.is-arrow-chevron){transform:scaleX(1)}.wp-block-query-pagination.aligncenter{justify-content:center}
</style>
<style id='wp-block-post-content-inline-css'>
.wp-block-post-content{display:flow-root}
</style>
<style id='wp-block-separator-inline-css'>
@charset "UTF-8";.wp-block-separator{border:none;border-top:2px solid}:root :where(.wp-block-separator.is-style-dots){height:auto;line-height:1;text-align:center}:root :where(.wp-block-separator.is-style-dots):before{color:currentColor;content:"···";font-family:serif;font-size:1.5em;letter-spacing:2em;padding-left:2em}.wp-block-separator.is-style-dots{background:none!important;border:none!important}
</style>

</style>

.wp-block-tag-cloud{box-sizing:border-box}.wp-block-tag-cloud.aligncenter{justify-content:center;text-align:center}.wp-block-tag-cloud.alignfull{padding-left:1em;padding-right:1em}.wp-block-tag-cloud a{display:inline-block;margin-right:5px}.wp-block-tag-cloud span{display:inline-block;margin-left:5px;text-decoration:none}:root :where(.wp-block-tag-cloud.is-style-outline){display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1ch}:root :where(.wp-block-tag-cloud.is-style-outline a){border:1px solid;font-size:unset!important;margin-right:0;padding:1ch 2ch;text-decoration:none!important}
</style>

		border: none !important;
		box-shadow: none !important;
		height: 1em !important;
		width: 1em !important;

.wave-cover-fix {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  min-height: 70vh !important;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end; /* Keep wave pinned to bottom */
}

/* Wave SVG block */
.animated-wave-fix {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -1px; /* Hides edge line on all screen sizes */
  left: 0;
  width: 100vw;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  line-height: 0;
  display: block;
  z-index: 2;
	pointer-events: none; /* ✅ This allows clicks to pass through */
}

  position: relative !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
}

  position: absolute;
  left: 40px;
  bottom: 100px;
  transform: rotate(-6deg);
  width: 220px;
  z-index: 2;
}

  position: absolute;

  width: 200px;
  z-index: 1;
}

  .welcome-to-storyflow__image-01,

  .welcome-to-storyflow__image-04,
  .welcome-to-storyflow__image-05 {
    display: none;
  }
}
/* Fix home page wave not stretching full width on mobile */
.animated-wave-fix {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -1px;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  line-height: 0;
  display: block;
  z-index: 2;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Prevent accidental horizontal scrolling */
body {
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* === FINAL MOBILE MENU – CLEAN, SCROLLABLE, POLISHED === */
@media screen and (max-width: 768px) {
  #modal-1.wp-block-navigation__responsive-container.has-modal-open.is-menu-open {
    position: fixed !important;
    top: 85px !important;
    left: 50% !important;
    transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
    width: 90vw !important;
    max-width: 720px !important;
    max-height: calc(100vh - 85px) !important; /* Fixes contact being cut off */
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) !important;
    backdrop-filter: blur(14px) !important;
    border-radius: 28px !important;
    overflow-y: auto !important;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    z-index: 9999 !important;
    display: flex !important;
    flex-direction: column !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    padding-top: 12px !important;
  }

    display: flex !important;
    flex-direction: column !important;
    align-items: center !important;

  }

    width: 100% !important;

  }

  }

    color: #f5c22f !important; /* Your theme yellow */
  }

    color: #f5c22f !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
  }

    position: absolute !important;
    top: 16px !important;
    right: 16px !important;
    padding: 8px !important;
    font-size: 22px !important;
    z-index: 10001 !important;
    background: none !important;
    border: none !important;
    color: #000 !important;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease;
  }

  .wp-block-navigation__responsive-container-close:hover {
    transform: scale(1.2);
    cursor: pointer;
  }
}

  overflow-x: hidden;

<style id='wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css'>

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text {
			border: 0;
			clip-path: inset(50%);
			height: 1px;
			margin: -1px;
			overflow: hidden;
			padding: 0;
			position: absolute !important;
			width: 1px;
			word-wrap: normal !important;
		}

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text:focus {
			background-color: #eee;
			clip-path: none;
			color: #444;
			display: block;
			font-size: 1em;
			height: auto;
			left: 5px;
			line-height: normal;
			padding: 15px 23px 14px;
			text-decoration: none;
			top: 5px;
			width: auto;
			z-index: 100000;
		}
</style>

<section class="wp-block-group alignfull page-title is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" id="home">

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-28f84493 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow" style="padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30)">
<div class="wp-block-group has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="margin-bottom:0;padding-top:8rem;padding-bottom:8rem">
<p class="has-primary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-x-large-font-size wp-elements-96a881cfe5baef4fc075ec2316b706c2">Branding and Storytelling</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-oswald-font-family" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--30);font-size:clamp(2.629rem, 2.629rem + ((1vw - 0.2rem) * 2.964), 5rem);font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.1;text-transform:uppercase">Creator Economy</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-left has-large-font-size" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);font-style:normal;font-weight:400">You have a story to tell. A story that makes you stand out in the<br>creator economy. But how do you tell it with the best tools and techniques?</p>



<a href="https://andyhtu.com/hyprr-academy/" class="wp-block-goldeyes-buttons goldeyes-app-button has-dark-color has-primary-background-color has-text-color has-background goldeyes-button-a75481d7-448b-4d3a-b474-9bb7e1ae2942 has-extra-small-font-size" target="_self" rel="noopener" style="font-style:normal;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;border-width:0px;border-radius:10px;margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--60);margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--60);padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70)">Grow Your Business</a><style>.goldeyes-button-a75481d7-448b-4d3a-b474-9bb7e1ae2942:hover{background-color: #F4F4F4!important;}.goldeyes-button-a75481d7-448b-4d3a-b474-9bb7e1ae2942:hover{color: #212121!important;}</style>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div></div>
</section>

<p class="has-text-align-center has-dark-color has-text-color has-link-color has-large-font-size wp-elements-a11d6890b9f7b23ec93f7769a9f10eb7" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);line-height:1.4"><mark style="background-color:#EDBF50" class="has-inline-color">Web3 is the future of marketing.</mark> It’s where you can create value, build trust, and engage your audience in a new way. <h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/how-does-socialfi-work-the-future-of-decentralized-social-media/" target="_self" >How Does SocialFi Work? The Future of Decentralized Social Media</a></h2>

<div style="margin-top:0.75rem;margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);" class="has-link-color wp-elements-0d52e93f9e7af62a3f0b72e4b8fd59d6 wp-block-post-excerpt has-text-color has-dark-text-color"><p class="wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt">SocialFi exists at the juncture of Web3 and social media. It introduces a novel way of creating, managing,&hellip; </p></div>


<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-466be3f93862ca9b5f9d4f06304d3b57 is-content-justification-space-between is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-87dbdb16 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:1rem;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">
<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-6ae5ec35e04d9d045667883e980c1343 is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-dac4e43e wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:0;margin-right:0.25rem;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">
				<p>1275</p>
			


<p style="margin-right:0.7rem;margin-left:0.2rem">Views </p>
</div>

</div>

</li><li class="wp-block-post post-4125 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-web3 category-creator-economy tag-creator-economy tag-socialfi tag-web3">

<div class="wp-block-group has-white-background-color has-background is-layout-flow wp-container-core-group-is-layout-011911bf wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="border-radius:30px;padding-top:20px;padding-right:20px;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:20px"><figure class="wp-block-post-featured-image"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/what-is-included-in-the-creator-economy-artists-influencers-and-founders/" target="_self"  ><img decoding="async" width="1000" height="667" src="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Man-in-white-suit-underwater.jpg" class="attachment-post-thumbnail size-post-thumbnail wp-post-image" alt="What Is Included in the Creator Economy: Artists, Influencers, and Founders" style="border-radius:20px;object-fit:cover;" srcset="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Man-in-white-suit-underwater.jpg 1000w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Man-in-white-suit-underwater-300x200.jpg 300w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Man-in-white-suit-underwater-768x512.jpg 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1000px) 100vw, 1000px" /></a></figure>

<h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/what-is-included-in-the-creator-economy-artists-influencers-and-founders/" target="_self" >What Is Included in the Creator Economy: Artists, Influencers, and Founders</a></h2>

<div style="margin-top:0.75rem;margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);" class="has-link-color wp-elements-0d52e93f9e7af62a3f0b72e4b8fd59d6 wp-block-post-excerpt has-text-color has-dark-text-color"><p class="wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt">What is included in The Creator Economy? <h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/the-key-drivers-of-creator-economy/" target="_self" >Understanding the Key Drivers of the Creator Economy</a></h2>

<div style="margin-top:0.75rem;margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);" class="has-link-color wp-elements-0d52e93f9e7af62a3f0b72e4b8fd59d6 wp-block-post-excerpt has-text-color has-dark-text-color"><p class="wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt">Learn about the Key Drivers of the Creator Economy and its impact on digital content creators. Dive into&hellip; </p></div>


<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-466be3f93862ca9b5f9d4f06304d3b57 is-content-justification-space-between is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-87dbdb16 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:1rem;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">
<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-6ae5ec35e04d9d045667883e980c1343 is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-dac4e43e wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:0;margin-right:0.25rem;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">

</li><li class="wp-block-post post-4134 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-web3 category-creator-economy tag-creator-economy tag-web3">

<div class="wp-block-group has-white-background-color has-background is-layout-flow wp-container-core-group-is-layout-011911bf wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="border-radius:30px;padding-top:20px;padding-right:20px;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:20px"><figure class="wp-block-post-featured-image"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/the-creator-economy-is-booming-opportunities-for-content-creators/" target="_self"  ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1000" height="667" src="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/instagram-model-in-sunset.jpg" class="attachment-post-thumbnail size-post-thumbnail wp-post-image" alt="The Growth of the Creator Economy:  Opportunities for Content Creators" style="border-radius:20px;object-fit:cover;" srcset="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/instagram-model-in-sunset.jpg 1000w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/instagram-model-in-sunset-300x200.jpg 300w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/instagram-model-in-sunset-768x512.jpg 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1000px) 100vw, 1000px" /></a></figure>

<h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/the-creator-economy-is-booming-opportunities-for-content-creators/" target="_self" >The Growth of the Creator Economy:  Opportunities for Content Creators</a></h2>

<h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/nfts-lasting-impact-why-they-remain-relevant/" target="_self" >The Powerful Future of NFTs: Hope or Hype?</a></h2>

</div>

</li><li class="wp-block-post post-4140 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-creator-economy tag-creator-economy">

<div class="wp-block-group has-white-background-color has-background is-layout-flow wp-container-core-group-is-layout-011911bf wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="border-radius:30px;padding-top:20px;padding-right:20px;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:20px"><figure class="wp-block-post-featured-image"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/creator-economy-a-comprehensive-guide/" target="_self"  ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1000" height="667" src="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/suave-business-man-in-shades-sitting-by-the-pool.jpg" class="attachment-post-thumbnail size-post-thumbnail wp-post-image" alt="Creator Economy: A Comprehensive Guide" style="border-radius:20px;object-fit:cover;" srcset="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/suave-business-man-in-shades-sitting-by-the-pool.jpg 1000w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/suave-business-man-in-shades-sitting-by-the-pool-300x200.jpg 300w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/suave-business-man-in-shades-sitting-by-the-pool-768x512.jpg 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1000px) 100vw, 1000px" /></a></figure>

<h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/creator-economy-a-comprehensive-guide/" target="_self" >Creator Economy: A Comprehensive Guide</a></h2>

<div style="margin-top:0.75rem;margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);" class="has-link-color wp-elements-0d52e93f9e7af62a3f0b72e4b8fd59d6 wp-block-post-excerpt has-text-color has-dark-text-color"><p class="wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt">The Creator Economy offers a more accessible avenue for employment than the conventional job market, which is currently&hellip; </p></div>


<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-466be3f93862ca9b5f9d4f06304d3b57 is-content-justification-space-between is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-87dbdb16 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:1rem;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">

<h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/what-is-the-future-of-the-creator-economy/" target="_self" >What is the Future of the Creator Economy?</a></h2>

<div style="margin-top:0.75rem;margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);" class="has-link-color wp-elements-0d52e93f9e7af62a3f0b72e4b8fd59d6 wp-block-post-excerpt has-text-color has-dark-text-color"><p class="wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt">Think about this for a moment: it is estimated that by 2025, the creator economy will be worth&hellip; </p></div>

<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-6ae5ec35e04d9d045667883e980c1343 is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-dac4e43e wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:0;margin-right:0.25rem;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">

</div>

</li><li class="wp-block-post post-4170 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-web3 category-creator-economy tag-creator-economy tag-web3">

<div class="wp-block-group has-white-background-color has-background is-layout-flow wp-container-core-group-is-layout-011911bf wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="border-radius:30px;padding-top:20px;padding-right:20px;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:20px"><figure class="wp-block-post-featured-image"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/web3-shaping-the-future-of-the-creator-economy/" target="_self"  ><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1100" height="733" src="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Pink-Influencer-in-spider-web-3.jpg" class="attachment-post-thumbnail size-post-thumbnail wp-post-image" alt="Web3: Shaping the Future of the Creator Economy" style="border-radius:20px;object-fit:cover;" srcset="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Pink-Influencer-in-spider-web-3.jpg 1100w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Pink-Influencer-in-spider-web-3-300x200.jpg 300w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Pink-Influencer-in-spider-web-3-1024x682.jpg 1024w, https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Pink-Influencer-in-spider-web-3-768x512.jpg 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1100px) 100vw, 1100px" /></a></figure>


<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-6a7d73382c0061e644e67d27cb3c368e is-content-justification-space-between is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-87dbdb16 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:1rem;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase"><div style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;margin-top:0;margin-right:0.25rem" class="taxonomy-category has-link-color wp-elements-86a71c416cca7e07ccbe47d2533007c3 wp-block-post-terms has-text-color has-secondary-color has-small-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><span class="wp-block-post-terms__prefix">In </span><a href="https://andyhtu.com/category/web3/" rel="tag">Web3</a><span class="wp-block-post-terms__separator">, </span><a href="https://andyhtu.com/category/creator-economy/" rel="tag">Creator Economy</a></div></div>


<h2 style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3;text-transform:uppercase; margin-top:0.6rem;" class="has-link-color wp-elements-86bdaa71e81087e0f6bb63239d10973e wp-block-post-title has-text-color has-dark-color has-2-x-large-font-size has-oswald-font-family"><a href="https://andyhtu.com/web3-shaping-the-future-of-the-creator-economy/" target="_self" >Web3: Shaping the Future of the Creator Economy</a></h2>

<div style="margin-top:0.75rem;margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--20);" class="has-link-color wp-elements-0d52e93f9e7af62a3f0b72e4b8fd59d6 wp-block-post-excerpt has-text-color has-dark-text-color"><p class="wp-block-post-excerpt__excerpt">Imagine a new creator economy &#8211; Web 3.0, a decentralized internet where creators can truly own their content,&hellip; </p></div>


<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-466be3f93862ca9b5f9d4f06304d3b57 is-content-justification-space-between is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-87dbdb16 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:1rem;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">
<div class="wp-block-group has-secondary-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-small-font-size wp-elements-6ae5ec35e04d9d045667883e980c1343 is-nowrap is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-dac4e43e wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:0;margin-right:0.25rem;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;text-transform:uppercase">
				<p>1096</p>
			


<p style="margin-right:0.7rem;margin-left:0.2rem">Views </p>
</div>



				<p>
					<span class='goldeyes-post-likes_count'>0</span>

<div class="wp-block-group sidebar__posts-container has-white-background-color has-background has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-1b972e80 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-style:none;border-width:0px;border-radius:20px;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50)">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-dark-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-large-font-size wp-elements-d2e19fc4c06dd8a544e901750e276da1" style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.4;text-transform:uppercase">Hyprr Academy</h2>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-text-color has-alpha-channel-opacity has-background is-style-default" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);background-color:#dbdbdb;color:#dbdbdb"/>



<div class="wp-block-query is-layout-flow wp-block-query-is-layout-flow"><ul class="wp-block-post-template is-layout-flow wp-block-post-template-is-layout-flow"><li class="wp-block-post post-12765 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-posing-ideas category-photography tag-poses">

<div class="wp-block-columns alignwide is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-28f84493 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">

<div class="wp-block-columns is-not-stacked-on-mobile sidebar__post is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-b8d85397 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0">

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-dark-color has-text-color has-link-color has-oswald-font-family has-large-font-size wp-elements-7f14a8506b42822fbe75b3968bb88421" style="font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.4;text-transform:uppercase">AI Workflow News</h2>

<p class="has-text-align-center has-dark-color has-text-color has-link-color has-2-x-large-font-size wp-elements-d7076990a0b6afe01abc0ebf1a284ffd">Thanks for reading my blog</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-dark-color has-text-color has-link-color has-5-x-large-font-size wp-elements-5cb24110c187c51fc2c449dec9cf59d5" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);font-style:normal;font-weight:400;line-height:1.3">Blending Photography with the Language of Film.</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-dark-text-color has-text-color has-link-color has-2-x-large-font-size wp-elements-24083a1133da3455845caaa4233a8136" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70)">If you&#8217;re serious about using AI tools to build something original, not just content, but story — then you&#8217;re in the right place. I share real techniques, visual strategy, and behind-the-scenes insights from my own experiences adapting photography into film.</p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-dark-text-color has-text-color has-link-color has-2-x-large-font-size wp-elements-0a42cc2703281139a32b20748cff6b6e" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--70)"><strong>No hype. Just tools, tips, and ideas that actually work.</strong><br>Sign up if you&#8217;re building something real.</p>

var EssentialBlocksProLocalize = {"eb_pro_plugins_url":"https:\/\/andyhtu.com\/wp-content\/plugins\/essential-blocks-pro\/","image_url":"https:\/\/andyhtu.com\/wp-content\/plugins\/essential-blocks-pro\/assets\/images","eb_pro_version":"2.0.4","ajax_url":"https:\/\/andyhtu.com\/wp-admin\/admin-ajax.php","adv_search_nonce":"e7e59c4ca3","eb_dynamic_tags":"eb-dynamic-tags","data_table_nonce":"f1ddf4808b","recaptcha_type":null,"post_grid_search_nonce":"8a05340345","fancy_chart_nonce":"4b3fea5a4d"};

<script src="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/plugins/essential-blocks/assets/js/eb-blocks-localize.js?ver=31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c" id="essential-blocks-blocks-localize-js"></script>
<script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
</script>
<script src="https://andyhtu.com/wp-content/plugins/contact-form-7/includes/swv/js/index.js?ver=6.1.5" id="swv-js"></script>
<script id="contact-form-7-js-before">
var wpcf7 = {
    "api": {
        "root": "https:\/\/andyhtu.com\/wp-json\/",
        "namespace": "contact-form-7\/v1"
    }
};
</script>
